title: Korak 1

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Statistics Calculator

Enter a list of comma-separated numbers.

The mean of a list of numbers is the average, calculated by taking the sum of all numbers and dividing that by the count of numbers.

Mean:

The median of a list of numbers is the number that appears in the middle of the list, when sorted from least to greatest.

Median:

The mode of a list of numbers is the number that appears most often in the list.

Mode:

The range of a list of numbers is the difference between the largest and smallest numbers in the list.

Range:

The variance of a list of numbers measures how far the values are from the mean, on average.

Variance:

The standard deviation of a list of numbers is the square root of the variance.

Standard Deviation:

challengeFiles.name: styles

tests.text: Trebalo bi da koristite glavnu reč const za deklarisanje parametra calculate.
Vaša funkcija za calculate treba da bude prazna.

description:
Statistika je način korišćenja računanja za razumevanje podataka. Pomaže nam da razumemo obrasce i trendove u informacijama, kako bismo mogli da predvidimo i donesemo odluke na osnovu tih informacija.

U ovom izazovu, kreiraćeš statistički kalkulator koji uzima skup brojeva i vraća prosečnu vrednost, medijanu, modu, standardnu devijaciju i varijansu.

HTML na CSS već su vam dostupni. Molimo vas proverite kod – možda ćete otkriti da je funkcija za calculate pozvana kada se formular pošalje. Za pripremu, deklarišite parametar za calculate i postavite praznu funkciju u fajl script.js.
